description: Gaius Octavius, later known as Augustus created a series of laws between 30 BCE and 2 BCE that transformed the constitution of the Roman Republic into the Constitution of the Roman Empire.  One of which created a standing army of approximately 28 legions consisting of 5,000-6,000 professional soldiers.
tooltip: Converts Republican infantry into Professional Legionaries. Unlocks Centurions and Onagers. Infantry become full-time soldiers: Their gather rates are significantly reduced, they cost +10 Metal but −10 Wood, build 25% faster, gain improved equipment (Javelineers switch to heavier pilums; 75% increased dmg but 20% less range, 50% longer repeat time and 2% slower walk. They also gain 2.5 Crush 3.5 Hack/Pierce resistance with better armor and shields), Swordsman gain 0.5 Crush 1 Hack and .5 Pierce through improved armor and are able to promote to First Cohert Legionary than Evocatus and finaly Principalis.
